sources.title: AI Act
sources.notes: Official explanatory page for the AI Act. The page reports a last update of 7 July 2026; no original page publication date is supplied.

sources.title: General-Purpose AI Models in the AI Act – Questions & Answers
sources.notes: Official interpretive Q&A that does not itself constitute an authoritative Commission position. The page reports a last update of 9 September 2025.

sources.title: The General-Purpose AI Code of Practice
sources.notes: The Code was published on 10 July 2025 and is a voluntary compliance tool; the underlying legal obligations arise from the AI Act.

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework
sources.issuingBody: United States National Institute of Standards and Technology
sources.notes: NIST released AI RMF 1.0 on 26 January 2023. The framework is voluntary and is not binding regulatory authority.

sources.title: Introducing the AI Safety Institute
sources.issuingBody: United Kingdom Department for Science, Innovation and Technology
sources.notes: Official overview of a government technical and research institute; it does not establish the Institute as a regulator.

sources.title: AI Safety Institute approach to evaluations
sources.issuingBody: United Kingdom Department for Science, Innovation and Technology
sources.notes: Official description of the Institute's evaluation approach and technical capacity, not evidence of compulsory regulatory power.

sources.title: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services
sources.issuingBody: Cyberspace Administration of China and six other national authorities
sources.notes: The measures were promulgated on 13 July 2023 and took effect on 15 August 2023.

sources.title: OECD.AI Policy Observatory: Policies dashboard
sources.issuingBody: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
sources.notes: A continuously maintained comparative policy resource; no stable publication date is supplied. It is not an enforcement authority.
